TranslationContext: This file contains rules strings from Unit Properties and equipment. Translation of rule terms should be kept consistent.

Translations.Key: +1 Defense. Charge Bonus: +1 Power
Translations.Translation: +1 Défense. Bonus de Charge: +1 Puissance

Translations.Key: +1 Movement
Translations.Translation: +1 Déplacement

Translations.Key: Charge Bonus: +1 Power
Translations.Translation: Bonus de Charge: +1 Puissance

Translations.Key: Reroll failed Discipline Tests
Translations.Translation: Relance les tests ratés de Discipline
Translations.Comment: Relance les tests de Discipline ratés

Translations.Key: Unit counts as being in Cover. (-1 to Ranged attack rolls against it).
Translations.Translation: L'Unité compte comme étant à Couvert. (-1 aux Attaques à distance rolls contre elle).

Translations.Key: +1 Combat Score
Translations.Translation: +1 Score de Combat

Translations.Key: Unit has +1 Attack this turn. Activate once per battle.
Translations.Translation: L'unité a +1 Attaque ce tour. Activation une fois par bataille.

Translations.Key: +1 Power. Charge Bonus: +1 Power.
Translations.Translation: +1 Puissance. Bonus de Charge: +1 Puissance.

Translations.Key: -1 Movement. +1 Defense
Translations.Translation: -1 Déplacement. +1 Défense

Translations.Key: If a Commander is part of this unit it re-rolls failed Discipline tests.
Translations.Translation: Si un Commandant fait partie de cette unité, elle relance les tests ratés de Discipline.
Translations.Comment: Si un Commandant fait partie de cette unité, elle relance les tests de Discipline ratés

Translations.Key:
Charge Bonus: +1 Power 
Damage Saves against this weapon are never better than 4+.
Translations.Translation:
Bonus de Charge: +1 Puissance 
 Les Sauvegardes de Dégâts contre cette arme ne sont jamais meilleures que 4+.

Translations.Key: +1 Defense. Extra Rank supporting attacks when not charging.
Translations.Translation: +1 Défense. Combat sur un rang supplémentaire lorsqu'elle ne charge pas.

Translations.Key: Range: 30. Power 3.
Translations.Translation: Portée: 30. Puissance 3.

Translations.Key: Range: 33. Power 3.
Translations.Translation: Portée: 33. Puissance 3.

Translations.Key: Ignores all penalties to Discipline tests.
Translations.Translation: Ignore toutes les pénalités de test de Discipline.

Translations.Key: +1 Attack
Translations.Translation: +1 Attaque

Translations.Key: Activate once per battle. Give all your units +1 Combat Score for one turn.
Translations.Translation: Activation une fois par bataille. Donne à toutes vos unités +1 Score de Combat pour un tour.

Translations.Key: +1 Defense. +1 Wounds
Translations.Translation: +1 Défense. +1 Blessure

Translations.Key: Reroll failed damage saves.
Translations.Translation: Relance les sauvegardes ratées de dégâts.
Translations.Comment: Relance les sauvegardes de dégâts ratées.

Translations.Key: +1 Discipline
Translations.Translation: +1 Discipline

Translations.Key: +1 Power. +1 Defense
Translations.Translation: +1 Puissance. +1 Défense

Translations.Key: Opponent re-rolls successful damage saves.
Translations.Translation: L'adversaire relance les sauvegardes réussies de dégâts.
Translations.Comment: L'adversaire relance les sauvegardes de dégâts réussies.

Translations.Key: +1 Power.
Translations.Translation: +1 Puissance.

Translations.Key: +1 Attack.
Translations.Translation: +1 Attaque.

Translations.Key: +1 to Hit rolls.
Translations.Translation: +1 jets pour Toucher.

Translations.Key: Reroll missed attacks.
Translations.Translation: Relance les attaques ratés.

Translations.Key: Activate once per battle. Commander and Retinue rerolls Attack Rolls for one turn.
Translations.Translation: Activation une fois par bataille. Le Commandant et sa Suite relancent les jets d'Attaque pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Target unit gets +1 to Damage Saves for one turn. It must re-roll succesfull Attack and Ranged Attack rolls.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée obtient +1 à la Sauvegarde de Dégâts pour un tour. Elle doit relancer les jets d'Attaques réussis au corps à corps et à Distance.

Translations.Key: Target unit gets +1 Skill and rerolls failed Discipline tests for one turn.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée obtient +1 Compétence et relance les tests de Discipline ratés pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Target unit rerolls failed damage saves for one turn.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée relance les sauvegardes ratées de dégâts pour un tour.
Translations.Comment: L'unité ciblée relance les sauvegardes de dégâts ratées pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Unit recovers all missing wounds at end of turn.
Translations.Translation: L'unité récupère toutes les blessures manquantes à la fin du tour.

Translations.Key: Ignore movement penalties from Difficult Terrain
Translations.Translation: Ignore la pénalité de déplacement des Terrains Difficiles

Translations.Key: All your units have +1 Power for one turn.
Translations.Translation: Toutes vos unités ont +1 Puissance pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Target unit has +1 Power and rerolls missed Attack Rolls for one turn.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée a +1 Puissance et relance les jets d'Attaque ratés pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Target unit counts as being in Cover against ranged attacks until it's next combat.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée compte comme étant à Couvert contre les attaques à distance jusqu'à son prochain combat.

Translations.Key: All your Goblins are Fearless for one turn. Activate once per battle.
Translations.Translation: Tout vos Gobelins sont Intrépide pour un tour. Activation une fois par bataille.

Translations.Key: -1 Movement. Ignore the movement penalty from Heavy Armor.
Translations.Translation: -1 Déplacement. Ignore les pénalités de déplacement de l'Armure Lourde.

Translations.Key: Unit can be deployed anywhere on its owners side of the table.
Translations.Translation: L'unité peut être déployée n'importe où du côté de son propriétaire sur la table.

Translations.Key: Re-roll missed Attack Rolls in the first round of combat.
Translations.Translation: Relance les jets d'Attaque ratés au premier round de combat.

Translations.Key: +1 to Damage Saves
Translations.Translation: +1 aux Sauvegardes de Dégâts

Translations.Key: Activate once per battle: All your units have +1 Defense for one turn.
Translations.Translation: Activation une fois par bataille: Toutes vos unités ont +1 Défence pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Re-roll missed Attack Rolls.
Translations.Translation: Relance les jets d'Attaque ratés.

Translations.Key: Rally a fleeing unit. One use per battle.
Translations.Translation: Rallie une unitée en Fuite. Activation une fois par bataille.

Translations.Key: Reduce target units movement speed to 0 for one turn.
Translations.Translation: Reduis le mouvenment d'une unité choisi à 0 pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Target unit gets +1 Power on their next Ranged or Close Combat Attack.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée obtient +1 Puissance à sa prochaine attaque à distance ou au corps à corps.

Translations.Key: -1 Movement. Never fails Discipline tests, loses D3 wounds on lost combat.
Translations.Translation: -1 Déplacement. Ne rate jamais un jet de Discipline, perds D3 blessures durant un combat perdu.

Translations.Key: Unarmed attacks
Translations.Translation: Attaques à mains nues

Translations.Key: Opponents re-roll hits in close combat.
Translations.Translation: L'adversaires relance ses jets de touche au corps à corps.

Translations.Key: Reduce Crumble by 1. Regeneration (restore all lost wounds at end of turn).
Translations.Translation: Reduis la déterioration de 1. Regeneration (restaure toutes les blessures à la fin du tour).
Translations.Comment: Reduis la Déterioration de 1. Régénération (restaure toutes les blessures à la fin du tour).

Translations.Key: Increase the move speed of target Reanimated unit by 3 until its next combat.
Translations.Translation: Augmente la vitesse de déplacement de l'unité Réanimée ciblée de 3 jusqu'à son prochain combat.

Translations.Key: Restore D3+1 wounds to a Reanimated unit.
Translations.Translation: Restaure D3+1 blessures à une unité Réanimée.

Translations.Key: Target unit has -1 Skill and -1 Move Speed. Lasts until end of battle.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée a -1 Compétence and -1 Vitesse de Mouvement. Reste jusqu'à la fin de la Bataille.

Translations.Key: Raise D3+3 models on a Zombie or Skeleton Warrior, Spear or Archer unit.
Translations.Translation: Relève D3+3 modéles d'une unité de Zombie ou de Squelette Guerrier, Lancier ou Archer.
Translations.Comment: Relève D3+3 modèles d'une unité de Zombie ou de Squelette Guerrier, Lancier ou Archer.

Translations.Key: Target unit loses D3 wounds and gains +1 Attack this turn.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée perd D3 blessures et gagne +1 Attaque à ce tour.

Translations.Key: Commanders retinue deploys with Ambush.
Translations.Translation: La suite du Commandant gagne deploiement en Embuscade.

Translations.Key: Never fails Discipline tests, loses D3 wounds on lost combat.
Translations.Translation: Ne rate jamais un jet de Discipline, perds D3 blessures durant un combat perdu.

Translations.Key: Favoured by War. Unit has Frenzy (re-roll failed Attack Rolls in the first round of combat).
Translations.Translation: Favorisé par la  Guerre. L'unité a Frénésie (relance les jets d'Attaque ratés au premier tour de combat).

Translations.Key: Charge Bonus: +1 Power, +1 Attack
Translations.Translation: Bonus de Charge: +1 Puissance, +1 Attaque

Translations.Key: Gain +3 Attacks this turm. Lose 1 Wound.
Translations.Translation: Gagne +3 Attaques pendant ce tour. Perd 1 Blessure.

Translations.Key: Target a friendly unit that is attacking an enemy unit in the flank/rear. It re-rolls failed Attack rolls this turn.
Translations.Translation: Cible une unité ami qui attaque un ennemi de flanc/ à l'arrière. Elle relance les jets d'Attaque ratés ce tour.

Translations.Key: All your Northmen are Fearless for one turn. Activate once per battle.
Translations.Translation: Tous vos Hommes du Nord sont Intrépide pour un tour. Activation une fois par bataille.

Translations.Key: Restore all used spell charges.
Translations.Translation: Restaure toutes les charges de sort utilisés.

Translations.Key: All your units have Frenzy (reroll failed Attack Rolls) this turn. Activate once per battle.
Translations.Translation: Toutes vos unités ont Frénésie (relance les jets d'Attaque raté) ce tour. Activation une fois par bataille.

Translations.Key: Commander is hidden from your opponent until engaged in combat or damaged.
Translations.Translation: Votre Commandant est caché de vos ennemis jusqu'à ce qu'il engage le combat ou subis des dégâts.

Translations.Key: A spirit of nature. Ignores Difficult Terrain.
Translations.Translation: Un esprit de la nature. Ignore les Terrains Difficiles.

Translations.Key: Re-roll missed Ranged Attack Rolls.
Translations.Translation: Relance les jets d'Attaque à Distance ratés .

Translations.Key: Range: 30. 3x Power 3.
Translations.Translation: Portée: 30. 3x Puissance 3.

Translations.Key: All your units have +1 Skill for one turn.
Translations.Translation: Toutes vos unités ont +1 Compétence pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Restore D3 wounds to a Forest Spirit unit.
Translations.Translation: Restaure D3 blessures à une unité d'Esprits de la Forêt.

Translations.Key: For one turn, reduce move speed to zero. Re-roll failed damage saves and discipline tests. Activate once per battle.
Translations.Translation: Pour un tour, reduis la vitesse de mouvement à zéro. Relance les sauvegardes de dégâts et les test de discipline ratés. Activation une fois par bataille.

Translations.Key: Target another friendly unit. It immediately makes a retreat move. One use per battle.
Translations.Translation: Cible une autre unité ami. Elle fait immédiatement un mouvement de retraite. Une utilisation par bataille.

Translations.Key: Favoured by Trickery. Unit has Ambush Deployment and +1 Move Speed
Translations.Translation: Favorisé par Trickery. L'unité a le déploiement en embuscade and +1 vitesse de mouvement

Translations.Key: Favoured by Decay. +1 Wounds. -1 Move Speed.
Translations.Translation: Favorisé par Decay. +1 Blessure. -1 Move Speed.

Translations.Key: Once per battle, all friendly units with Gift of Decay re-roll failed damage saves.
Translations.Translation: Once par bataille, all friendly units with Gift of Decay relancer ratés sauvegardes de dégâts.
Translations.Comment: Une fois par bataille, toutes les unités amies avec

Translations.Key: Once per battle, all friendly units with Gift of Trickery gain +3 move speed and Cover for one turn.
Translations.Translation: Once par bataille, all friendly units with Gift of Trickery gain +3 move speed and Cover pour un tour.

Translations.Key:
Ignores movement penalty from Heavy Armor.
When deployed 3 wide, models in flanks can attack as if in the front rank.
Translations.Translation:
Ignorers pénalité de déplacement from Armure Lourde.
When deployed 3 wide, models in flanks can attack as if in the front rank.

Translations.Key:
Reroll all successful Attack and Ranged Attack rolls against this unit.
Ignores Difficult Terrain.
Translations.Translation:
Relancer all réussis Attaque and jets d'Attaque à Distance against cette unité.
Ignorers Terrain Difficile.

Translations.Key: Maiden and retinue rerolls 1s on Damage Saves.
Translations.Translation: Maiden and retinue rerolls 1s on Sauvegardes de Dégâts.

Translations.Key: Caster has +1 Power and deals double wounds against Monsters this turn.
Translations.Translation: Caster has +1 Puissance and deals double wounds against Monsters ce tour.

Translations.Key: Paladin and retinue rerolls 1s on Attack Rolls.
Translations.Translation: Paladin and retinue rerolls 1s on jets d'Attaque.

Translations.Key: Range 13. 3D3 Power 3.
Translations.Translation: Portée 13. 3D3 Puissance 3.

Translations.Key: +3 Movement this turn.
Translations.Translation: +3 Déplacement ce tour.

Translations.Key: Always counts as being in Cover. -3 Defense in Close Combat. Unit can't charge.

Charge Bonus: +1 Power 
Damage Saves against this weapon are never better than 3+.

Bonus de Charge: +1 Puissance

Translations.Key: This units ranged attack deals 3x wounds against multiwound targets.

Unit can fire ranged weapons in one additional rank.

Unit can fire ranged weapons in one additional rank.

Translations.Translation: L'unité peut se déplacer et tirer avec des armes à distance.

Translations.Key: Unit re-rolls missed Attack Rolls.
Translations.Translation: Unit relance ratés jets d'Attaque.

Translations.Key: Unit re-rolls missed Attack Rolls and is Fearless (Ignores penalties to Discipline tests).
Translations.Translation: Unit relance ratés jets d'Attaque and is Intrépide (Ignorers penalties to tests de Discipline).

Translations.Key: Unit has +1 to Combat Score and is Fearless (Ignores penalties to Discipline tests).
Translations.Translation: L'unité a +1 to Score de Combat and is Intrépide (Ignorers penalties to tests de Discipline).

Translations.Translation: L'unité a +3 range for attaques à distance.

Translations.Key: Unit has +3 range for Ranged attacks and ignores penalties for difficult terrain.
Translations.Translation: L'unité a +3 range for attaques à distance and ignores penalties for difficult terrain.

Translations.Key: Unit has +1 to Combat Score.
Translations.Translation: L'unité a +1 to Score de Combat.

Translations.Key: Reduce Crumble rolls by 1. Increase Move Speed by 1. +3 Wounds
Translations.Translation: Reduce Crumble rolls by 1. Increase Move Speed by 1. +3 Blessure

Translations.Key: Reduce Crumble rolls by 1.
Translations.Translation: Réduit les jets d'Effondrement de 1.

Translations.Key: Reduce Crumble rolls by 1. Increase Move Speed by 1.
Translations.Translation: Réduit les jets d'Effondrement de 1. Augmente la Vitesse de Déplacement de 1.

Translations.Key: +1 Attack, -1 Skill.
Translations.Translation: +1 Attaque, -1 Compétence.

Translations.Key: +3 Attacks, -1 Skill.
Translations.Translation: +3 Attaques, -1 Compétence.

Translations.Key: +1 Ranged Attack, -1 Skill.
Translations.Translation: +1 Attaque à Distance, -1 Compétence.

Translations.Key: Range 13. 3D3 Power 3. -1 Defense.
Translations.Translation: Portée 13. 3D3 Puissance 3. -1 Défense.

Translations.Key: Range 13. D3 Power 3. -1 Defense.
Translations.Translation: Portée 13. D3 Puissance 3. -1 Défense.

Translations.Key: Fly Speed 13. Ignore Terrain. -1 Discipline.
Translations.Translation: Fly Speed 13. Ignorer Terrain. -1 Discipline.

Translations.Key: Unit counts as Reanimated. (Never fails Discipline tests, loses D3 wounds on lost combat )+1 Defense,  -1 Move Speed.
Translations.Translation: L'unité compte as Reanimated. (Never fails tests de Discipline, loses D3 wounds on lost combat )+1 Défense,  -1 Move Speed.

Translations.Key: Opponents re-roll hits in close combat.
Translations.Translation: L'adversaires relancer hits in close combat.

Translations.Key: Ambush deployment.
Translations.Translation: Embuscade deployment.

Translations.Key: +1 Wound. -1 Move Speed.
Translations.Translation: +1 Blessure. -1 Vitesse de Déplacement.

Translations.Key: +1 Wounds. +1Power
Translations.Translation: +1 Blessure. +1Puissance

Translations.Key: +3 Wounds. -1 Move Speed.
Translations.Translation: +3 Blessure. -1 Move Speed.

Translations.Key: +3 range to Ranged Attacks
Translations.Translation: +3 range to Attaque à Distances

Translations.Key: +3 range to Ranged Attacks. Damage saves against units Ranged Attack are reduced by 1.
Translations.Translation: +3 range to Attaque à Distances. Damage saves against units Attaque à Distance are reduced by 1.

Translations.Key: Unit gets supporting attacks from one extra rank.
Translations.Translation: L'unité obtient des attaques de soutien d'un rang supplémentaire.

Translations.Key: Unit gets supporting attacks from one extra rank and re-rolls missed Attack Rolls.
Translations.Translation: Unit gets supporting attacks from one extra rank and relance ratés jets d'Attaque.

Translations.Key: +1 Move Speed
Translations.Translation: +1 Vitesse de Déplacement

Translations.Key: +1 Move Speed. Charge Bonus: +1 Attack.
Translations.Translation: +1 Move Speed. Bonus de Charge: +1 Attaque.

Translations.Key: +1 Move Speed and ignores Difficult Terrain
Translations.Translation: +1 Move Speed and ignores Terrain Difficile

Translations.Key: Lethal Attacks. (3x wounds)
Translations.Translation: Lethal Attaques. (3x wounds)

Translations.Key: Regeneration. (restores all wounds at end of turn)
Translations.Translation: Regeneration. (restores all wounds à la fin du tour)

Translations.Key: Poisoned Attacks (enemies re-roll 3s on Damage Saves)
Translations.Translation: Poisoned Attaques (enemies relancer 3s on Sauvegardes de Dégâts)

Translations.Key: Unit re-rolls 1s on Damage Saves
Translations.Translation: Unit relance 1s on Sauvegardes de Dégâts

Translations.Key: Reroll missed Attack Rolls when attacking from Flank or Rear
Translations.Translation: Relancer ratés jets d'Attaque when attacking from Flank or Rear

Translations.Key: +1 Attack and Fearless. Activate once per battle.
Translations.Translation: +1 Attaque and Intrépide. Activer une fois par bataille.

Translations.Key: Reroll 1s on Damage Saves
Translations.Translation: Relancer 1s on Sauvegardes de Dégâts

Translations.Key: All your units have +1 Power  and +3 Move Speed for one turn.
Translations.Translation: Toutes vos unités have +1 Puissance  and +3 Move Speed pour un tour.

Translations.Key: Earns 1 gold for each enemy killed in Combat.
Translations.Translation: Gagne 1 or pour chaque ennemi tué au Combat.

Translations.Key: All friendly units counts as being in Cover against ranged attacks untill it's next combat.
Translations.Translation: All friendly units compte comme étant à Couvert contre les attaques à distance untill it's next combat.

Translations.Key: Target unit gets +3 to Damage Saves this turn.
Translations.Translation: L'unité ciblée obtient +3 to Sauvegardes de Dégâts ce tour.

Translations.Key: +1 Damage Save vs Ranged
Translations.Translation: +1 Damage Save vs Portéed

Translations.Key:
Once per battle: Gain +1 Attack
+1 Damage Save vs Ranged
Translations.Translation:
Once par bataille: Gain +1 Attaque
+1 Damage Save vs Portéed

Translations.Key: +1 Wounds
Translations.Translation: +1 Blessure

Translations.Key:
Poisoned Attacks. (Opponent rerolls 3s on Damage Saves)
+1 Wounds
Translations.Translation:
Poisoned Attaques. (L'adversaire rerolls 3s on Sauvegardes de Dégâts)
+1 Blessure

Translations.Key:
Once per battle: Gain Flying for one turn. 
+1 Move Speed
Translations.Translation:
Once par bataille: Gain Vol pour un tour. 
+1 Move Speed

Translations.Key:
Once per battle, all friendly units with Gift of Decay re-roll failed damage saves.
Regeneration.
Translations.Translation:
Once par bataille, all friendly units with Gift of Decay relancer ratés sauvegardes de dégâts.
Regeneration.

Translations.Key:
Once per battle, all friendly units with Gift of Trickery gain +3 move speed and Cover.
Ambush Deployment.
Translations.Translation:
Once par bataille, all friendly units with Gift of Trickery gain +3 move speed and Cover.
Embuscade Deployment.

Translations.Key:
Once per battle, all friendly units with Gift of War gain Deadly Strikes  (3x Wounds caused).
Commander has Deadly Strikes.
Translations.Translation:
Once par bataille, all friendly units with Gift of War gain Deadly Strikes  (3x Blessure caused).
Commandant has Deadly Strikes.

Translations.Key: Unit has +10 range for Ranged attacks.
Translations.Translation: L'unité a +10 range for attaques à distance.

Translations.Key: Paladin and retinue rerolls 1s on Attack Rolls. Activate once per battle; all friendly Knights reroll failed Attack Rolls.
Translations.Translation: Paladin and retinue rerolls 1s on jets d'Attaque. Activer une fois par bataille; all friendly Knights reroll ratés jets d'Attaque.

Translations.Key: Maiden and retinue rerolls 1s on Damage Saves.. Activate once per battle; all friendly Knights reroll failed Damage Saves.
Translations.Translation: Maiden and retinue rerolls 1s on Sauvegardes de Dégâts.. Activer une fois par bataille; all friendly Knights reroll ratés Sauvegardes de Dégâts.

Translations.Key: -1 to targets Damage Save
Translations.Translation: -1 à la Sauvegarde de Dégâts de la cible

Translations.Key: These arrows deal 3x wounds against multiwound targets.
Translations.Translation: Ces flèches infligent 3x blessures contre les cibles multi-blessures.

Translations.Key: Gain +3 ranged attacks.
Translations.Translation: Gagne +3 attaques à distance.

Translations.Key: Ranged attacks have +10 range and ignores cover.
Translations.Translation: attaques à distance have +10 range and ignores cover.
